purebasicProjectEditor.xmlTagColor.descr: Color for XML tag names in the Raw XML view.
purebasicProjectEditor.xmlAttributeColor: Color for XML attribute names in the Raw XML view.
purebasicProjectEditor.xmlValueColor.des: Color for XML attribute values in the Raw XML view.
purebasicProjectEditor.xmlBracketColor.d: Color for XML brackets and punctuation in the Raw XML view.
purebasicProjectEditor.xmlCommentColor.d: Color for XML comments in the Raw XML view.
Color for XML processing instructions in the Raw XML view.
purebasicProjectEditor.inactiveTabForegr: Foreground color for inactive tabs in the PureBasic Project Editor (e.g. '#cccccc'). Leave empty to use the VS Code default foreground color.
pbProjectFiles.newProject.title: New PureBasic Project…
purebasicProjectEditor.newProject.templa: Absolute path to a .pbp file used as template when creating a new project. The template's targets, libraries, and compiler options are copied; name and data section are reset. Leave empty to start with a minimal default project.
